items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府出口管制指令再次发布声明，要求立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问，包括已发放的 API key。相对此前的初步通告，本次明确「all access」全面停服范围，并影响 Microsoft 等合作伙伴的部署。已在使用 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的生产系统必须立即回退到上一可用模型。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把代码中 model 字段从 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 切回 claude-opus-4-7（或当前可用版本），清理 Fable/Mythos 专属 prompt 缓存与 tool 适配层；关注 Anthropic 后续 deprecation 时间线，不要把临时回滚路径写死。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Tag，定位为「团队与 Claude 协作的新方式」，产品形态为团队级标签/工作区管理能力。相对此前的 Projects 能力，Claude Tag 强调跨成员共享上下文与权限分组。具体接口字段尚未在摘要中披露，需查阅发布说明。
items.backend_focus: 关注 Anthropic 官方发布说明中的 API/SDK 字段变更（如新增 tag_id、权限 scope 字段）；在确认字段前不要在生产代码中预埋 Claude Tag 相关逻辑，避免后续 schema 调整带来返工。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 扩展 Project Glasswing 至 15+ 国家的约 150 个新组织，是企业安全/可控部署计划扩容公告。相对此前的试点范围，本次规模化扩展。Project Glasswing 是面向受监管客户的部署能力，对公共 API 端点、模型名与限流策略没有公开变更。
items.backend_focus: 无。如果企业不参与 Project Glasswing，对使用 Anthropic API 的开发团队无影响；如未来要接入 Glasswing 部署，关注私有 endpoint 域名与 IAM 集成方式。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，Opus 系列升级版本，在编码、Agent 任务与专业工作负载上表现更强，并配套新 Context window 与 Tool Use 策略。相对 Claude Opus 4.7，在长链路 agentic 任务上能力提升，pricing 与限流细节需以官方 model card 为准。已在用 Opus 4.x 的服务应评估切换。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：把 Chat Completions / Messages API 中 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-7 切到 claude-opus-4-8；复核 max_tokens 与新增的 extended context 选项，确认下游 prompt cache 键与 tool schema 仍兼容，并按官方公告做 A/B 灰度。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 开设首尔办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项新合作，是区域市场拓展公告。相对此前的日本、新加坡等亚洲布局，本次新增韩国节点，面向韩国客户提供本地化支持。区域可用性方面，韩国客户或将获得更稳定的企业服务 SLA，但 API 端点域名与模型名未变。
items.backend_focus: 无。开发团队无需修改任何 API 域名或 SDK 版本；如服务面向韩国用户，可关注后续是否上线区域 endpoint 与本地化数据驻留选项。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首个 Public Record 的结果，是公司透明度与公共记录机制的第一期内容。属于政策/治理信息披露，不涉及任何模型版本、API 字段、SDK 变更或计费调整。相对此前的零散透明度报告，本次机制化发布。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，开发团队无需任何动作；如需在合规审计中引用 Anthropic 治理证据，可存档该 Public Record。
